arts.ttl: Arne Slot offers verdict on two controversial incidents in Liverpool's win over Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot would not be drawn on two of the major talking points following Wednesday night's huge 1-0 win over Everton in the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: He’s offside – David Moyes bemoans Diogo Jota winner as Liverpool edge derby
arts.sum: Jota’s 57th-minute goal gave Liverpool a 100th derby win over Everton.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot 'hates' rule that saw Liverpool beat Everton - 'I always ask'
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot explained his dislike for the rule that saw the Reds triumph over Everton in the derby

arts.ttl: Linda Pizzuti issues six-word Liverpool message after title race boost
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as sends a message after the Reds beat Everton in the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Four-word message spotted on Kop speaks volumes as Liverpool fears put to bed
arts.sum: Liverpool verdict from Paul Gorst after the Merseyside derby with Everton at Anfield

arts.ttl: David Moyes fumes at VAR decision in Liverpool defeat and makes Anfield jibe
arts.sum: David Moyes was disappointed after Liverpool scored a controversial winner in their win over Everton - with the Toffees manager also giving his verdict on James Tarkowski's wild tackle

arts.ttl: 'The goal is offside' - Moyes anger at Liverpool winner
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes says Liverpool's winner in the Merseyside derby should have been ruled out for offside.

arts.ttl: What James Tarkowski did at full-time after tackle as Jordan Pickford approaches Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: Everton defender James Tarkowski escaped a red card for a high challenge on Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister

arts.ttl: What furious David Moyes said to officials after controversial Liverpool goal
arts.sum: The Everton boss was unhappy that Diogo Jota's goal was allowed to stand at Anfield

arts.ttl: Gary Neville accuses James Tarkowski after VAR red card controversy - 'Trust me'
arts.sum: James Tarkowski thundered into Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister early in Tuesday's Merseyside derby but the Everton defender avoided a red card, despite a VAR check
